title: Survey and report on Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander cultural sites
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Survey and report on Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander cultural sites demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Identify, communicate and consult with key stakeholders

pcs.text: Work with Cultural Authorities to identify appropriate persons within Communities who hold cultural knowledge
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Work with Cultural Authorities to identify appropriate persons within Communities who hold cultural knowledge?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Work with Cultural Authorities to identify appropriate persons within Communities who hold cultural knowledge.

pcs.text: Develop and implement communication and consultation systems that place cultural protocols and values at the forefront
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop and implement communication and consultation systems that place cultural protocols and values at the forefront?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop and implement communication and consultation systems that place cultural protocols and values at the forefront.

pcs.text: Confirm traditional ownership of Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander cultural sites, material and objects with supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm traditional ownership of Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander cultural sites, material and objects with supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm traditional ownership of Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander cultural sites, material and objects with supervisor.

pcs.text: Engage with stakeholders to address concerns and interests
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Engage with stakeholders to address concerns and interests?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Engage with stakeholders to address concerns and interests.

pcs.text: Ensure approvals and permissions are obtained from relevant Traditional Owners for cultural sites access and work to be undertaken
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Ensure approvals and permissions are obtained from relevant Traditional Owners for cultural sites access and work to be undertaken?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure approvals and permissions are obtained from relevant Traditional Owners for cultural sites access and work to be undertaken.

pcs.text: Complete required submissions for conducting cultural sites surveys
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Complete required submissions for conducting cultural sites surveys?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Complete required submissions for conducting cultural sites surveys.

pcs.text: Scope and document client needs for deliverables in a formal sites survey report
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Scope and document client needs for deliverables in a formal sites survey report?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Scope and document client needs for deliverables in a formal sites survey report.

pcs.text: Manage planning and assessment processes, according to the Burra Charter process and other existing industry guidelines and legislation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Manage planning and assessment processes, according to the Burra Charter process and other existing industry guidelines and legislation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Manage planning and assessment processes, according to the Burra Charter process and other existing industry guidelines and legislation.

pcs.text: Identify and acquire required resources
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and acquire required resources?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and acquire required resources.

pcs.text: Source and verify sites plans and maps, including topographical maps
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Source and verify sites plans and maps, including topographical maps?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Source and verify sites plans and maps, including topographical maps.

pcs.text: Prepare a base plan of the sites
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare a base plan of the sites?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare a base plan of the sites.

pcs.text: Undertake sites orientation and define and verify location, geographic and operational boundaries
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Undertake sites orientation and define and verify location, geographic and operational boundaries?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Undertake sites orientation and define and verify location, geographic and operational boundaries.

pcs.text: Identify and record current land use and environmental problems and threats
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and record current land use and environmental problems and threats?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and record current land use and environmental problems and threats.

pcs.text: Identify and record covenants that could affect the sites or report
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and record covenants that could affect the sites or report?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and record covenants that could affect the sites or report.

pcs.text: Ascertain climate and weather conditions from historical data
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Ascertain climate and weather conditions from historical data?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ascertain climate and weather conditions from historical data.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Manage collection of initial sites data

elements.title: Compile a sites inventory

pcs.text: Categorise and record sites context, location and sites information data
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Categorise and record sites context, location and sites information data?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Categorise and record sites context, location and sites information data.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Categorise and record features data.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and record cultural material, objects, properties and relevant physical characteristics on sites inventory according to archaeological or scientific protocols.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Undertake relevant field research in accordance with safe work policies and procedures.

pcs.text: Implement appropriate techniques and tools and relevant archaeological practices and procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Implement appropriate techniques and tools and relevant archaeological practices and procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Implement appropriate techniques and tools and relevant archaeological practices and procedures.

pcs.text: Locate structural elements and confirm existing services and facilities
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Locate structural elements and confirm existing services and facilities?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Locate structural elements and confirm existing services and facilities.

pcs.text: Record the presence, location and/or extent of other relevant sites constraints
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record the presence, location and/or extent of other relevant sites constraints?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record the presence, location and/or extent of other relevant sites constraints.

pcs.text: Develop limits of acceptable change in the forms of deterioration and damage to the places of cultural significance to legislative and organisational requirements

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop limits of acceptable change in the forms of deterioration and damage to the places of cultural significance to legislative and organisational requirements.

pcs.text: Identify threats to culturally significant places, both external and internal to the area under consideration

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify threats to culturally significant places, both external and internal to the area under consideration.

pcs.text: Undertake a risk assessment of all threats to determine potential impact on sites and associated cultural landscape
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Undertake a risk assessment of all threats to determine potential impact on sites and associated cultural landscape?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Undertake a risk assessment of all threats to determine potential impact on sites and associated cultural landscape.

pcs.text: Develop and implement risk management strategies and protection/conservation measures to control risks
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop and implement risk management strategies and protection/conservation measures to control risks?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop and implement risk management strategies and protection/conservation measures to control risks.

pcs.text: Develop and document a risk management report that incorporates an impact analysis
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop and document a risk management report that incorporates an impact analysis?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop and document a risk management report that incorporates an impact analysis.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Document policy changes required to address the threats.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Document sites information into a sites assessment report or sites survey report.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Incorporate all relevant data from the sites assessment into assessment report in line with client needs and the requirements of relevant legislation and regulations.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Formulate and document recommendations for appropriate risk controls of sites hazards.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Store and maintain survey and assessment data as part of professional practice.
